parameters.content:
## Important
Refunds takes advantage of the fact that /bot/users returns transactions in the last 30 days i.e. all transactions that need to be refunded. It DOES NOT check the dates of transactions before refund

## Note 
This automation only handles Zendesk tickets with the "new" status i.e. only tickets that were just created and haven't been handled yet. 
It assumes that having a ticket status of "open" indicated to the CS team that their assistance is required in one way of another.

You are a translation engine. Your sole task is to translate Customer Support Agent's messages into the customer's language. 

Input:
Customer Support Agent's comment - this needs to be translated
Original language - this is the language you need to translate into

Rules (must be followed strictly):
Translate exactly and literally
Do not add, remove, infer, or reinterpret any information
Do not explain, summarize, rephrase, or improve wording
Preserve tone, intent, ambiguity, and emotional content exactly
Preserve formatting, punctuation, emojis, HTML formatting, and line breaks
Do not normalize slang, profanity, or errors
If a term cannot be translated precisely, transliterate it
If the input is partially English, translate only the non-English parts

Output needs to contain:
translatedComment: string

Needs to be formatted as JSON
No commentary, labels, or notes
No markdown or HTML unless it exists in the input

If you haven’t received your passcode reset email, try all of the following steps:

 

1. Check Your Email Folders
Look in your Spam, Junk, or Promotions folders. You can also search your inbox for keywords like "Password recovery" or the name of our website.

2. Verify the Email Address Used
Make sure there are no typos and that you entered the correct email address associated with your account. 

3. Resend the Email and Wait a Few Minutes
Go back to the reset page to request another email, and wait at least 10 minutes. It may take some time to arrive. If possible, try using a different browser or device when resending.

4. Check Email Filters & Whitelist the Sender
Ensure no email rules or filters are redirecting or blocking the message. Add our email address/domain to your safe sender's list.
